data.title: Alphabet Stock Bargain: Google Parent Has Lowest Valuation Among Magnificent 7 Stocks
data.description: Alphabet, over the past month, saw its stock dip by 13.24% due to an ongoing antitrust lawsuit. Investors see an attractive entry point.

Anti-Drug Groups Urge Congress To Ban Hemp-Derived Cannabinoids As Debate Grows
data.description: Anti-drug groups are urging Congress to ban hemp-derived cannabinoids like delta-8 THC. Led by CADCA, the coalition supports an amendment to the 2024 Farm Bill, citing health risks and regulatory gaps from the 2018 legislation
